name: Add an API endpoint to a Flask app
task: Add a POST /todos endpoint to /tmp/eval_api/app.py that accepts JSON with a 'title' field, creates a todo item with an auto-incrementing 'id' and 'completed': false, appends it to the list, and returns the new todo with HTTP 201. Also add DELETE /todos/<id> that removes a todo by id and returns 204, or 404 if not found.

validation.script: import importlib.util, sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/tmp/eval_api'); spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('app', '/tmp/eval_api/app.py'); m = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(m); client = m.app.test_client(); r1 = client.post('/todos', json={'title': 'Test'}); assert r1.status_code == 201, f'POST status {r1.status_code}'; data = r1.get_json(); assert data['title'] == 'Test'; assert data['completed'] == False; assert 'id' in data; tid = data['id']; r2 = client.get('/todos'); assert len(r2.get_json()) == 1; r3 = client.delete(f'/todos/{tid}'); assert r3.status_code == 204; r4 = client.delete(f'/todos/{tid}'); assert r4.status_code == 404; print('OK')
